data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an automatic photo quality check, which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this functionality. The prior step evidence does not address the photo quality check, leading to a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of automatic photo quality check functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
